channel.title: Travel on Barnali's
channel.description: Recent content in Travel on Barnali's

item.title: One Day in Mysore
item.description: Mysore, officially Mysuru, is the second-most populous city of the state of Karnataka after Bangalore. It was the capital of the Wodeyar dynasty, and is considered to be the cultural capital of Karnataka. Mysore is among the cleanest and best planned cities in India. We chose Mysore for a one-day escape from our daily life in Bengaluru. We decided to visit : Ranganathittu Bird Sanctuary Chamundeswari Temple Mysore Palace Brindavan Garden There are many places of attraction, but we chose only these four for our one-day trip and it was an amazing experience.
